interactions.concern: Aggressive caloric restriction combined with GLP-1 appetite suppression amplifies lean muscle mass loss beyond fat loss
interactions.recommendation: Limit fasting windows to 16:8 max. Prioritize protein during eating windows (1.2-1.6g/kg). Avoid OMAD while on GLP-1s.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature becomes visibly thinner but weaker, muscle definition fades

interactions.concern: Dual GIP/GLP-1 action causes stronger appetite suppression than semaglutide alone, making prolonged fasts risky for muscle preservation
interactions.recommendation: Keep eating windows at least 8 hours. Track protein intake carefully, aiming for 30g+ per meal. Consider creatine supplementation.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature loses bulk rapidly, stamina bar drops if protein intake insufficient

interactions.concern: Triple receptor agonist creates the strongest appetite suppression of all GLP-1s, making adequate nutrition during fasting windows extremely difficult
interactions.recommendation: Avoid extended fasts entirely. Focus on nutrient-dense meals with high protein. Consider a registered dietitian for meal planning.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature shrinks noticeably, mood drops from inadequate nutrition

interactions.concern: Without resistance training, up to 30-40% of weight lost on GLP-1s can be lean mass rather than fat
interactions.recommendation: Resistance training 3-4x/week is critical. This is the single most important lifestyle factor while on GLP-1 therapy. Progressive overload with compound movements.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature gains muscle definition and maintains strength. Without it, creature becomes 'skinny-fat' appearance

interactions.concern: Rapid weight loss from dual agonism makes resistance training even more critical than with semaglutide to preserve lean mass
interactions.recommendation: Non-negotiable: lift weights 3-4x/week. Focus on progressive overload. Protein timing around workouts is essential.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature maintains strong posture and energy. Skipping triggers visible muscle loss animation

interactions.concern: Fastest weight loss of all GLP-1s means muscle loss risk is highest without structured resistance training
interactions.recommendation: Begin resistance training before or simultaneously with starting retatrutide. 4x/week minimum. Consider working with a trainer.
interactions.creature_effect: Critical mitigation factor. Creature visibly deteriorates without it, thrives with consistent training

interactions.concern: Cardio alone without resistance training accelerates muscle loss during GLP-1 therapy. Excessive cardio on reduced calories risks overtraining.
interactions.recommendation: Cardio is fine but never as a substitute for resistance training. Moderate intensity 2-3x/week. Monitor for excessive fatigue.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature becomes leaner but loses muscle tone if cardio replaces lifting

interactions.concern: High-volume cardio combined with strong appetite suppression creates large caloric deficits that preferentially burn muscle
interactions.recommendation: Cap cardio at 150 min/week of moderate intensity. Always pair with resistance training. Increase calories on high-cardio days.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature endurance stat rises but strength plummets if resistance training neglected

interactions.concern: Extreme appetite suppression makes fueling endurance exercise very difficult, risking hypoglycemia and muscle catabolism
interactions.recommendation: Reduce cardio volume during dose titration. Carry fast-acting carbs during sessions. Prioritize resistance training over cardio.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature shows fatigue signs during cardio, energy bar depletes faster

interactions.concern: GLP-1 delays gastric emptying (gastroparesis effect). Alcohol stays in stomach longer, causing unpredictable and dangerously intensified intoxication.
interactions.recommendation: Dramatically reduce alcohol intake. One drink may feel like three. Never drink on an empty stomach. Alert social circle about changed tolerance.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature becomes dizzy and disoriented with even small alcohol exposure, mood swings

interactions.concern: Dual agonist gastroparesis effect is even more pronounced, making alcohol absorption extremely unpredictable
interactions.recommendation: Minimize or eliminate alcohol. If drinking, start with half your previous tolerance as baseline. Hydrate extensively.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature stumbles, nausea indicator flashes, recovery takes longer

interactions.concern: Strongest gastroparesis of all GLP-1s combined with glucagon receptor effects on liver metabolism creates highest risk profile with alcohol
interactions.recommendation: Strongly consider eliminating alcohol entirely. Liver is already working harder with triple agonist. Discuss with prescriber.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature shows severe adverse reaction, health bar drops sharply

interactions.concern: GH is primarily released during deep sleep. Bedtime dosing of CJC-1295 amplifies natural nocturnal GH pulses. Poor sleep undermines the entire protocol.
interactions.recommendation: Dose 30-60 minutes before bed on an empty stomach. Prioritize 7-9 hours of quality sleep. Sleep hygiene is non-negotiable for GH peptides.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature glows during good sleep nights, GH pulse animation visible. Poor sleep dims the creature

interactions.concern: Ipamorelin stimulates ghrelin receptor to trigger GH release, most effective when aligned with natural sleep-wake GH rhythms
interactions.recommendation: Bedtime dosing preferred. Maintain consistent sleep schedule. Avoid screens 1hr before bed. Dark, cool room enhances both sleep and GH response.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature recovery and growth stats boosted during well-timed sleep, stunted with poor sleep

interactions.concern: Approximately 8% of users report significant sleep disruption. Poor sleep blunts GH release and increases cortisol, creating a vicious cycle of impaired recovery.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor sleep quality closely after starting. If disrupted, discuss dose timing with prescriber. Consider magnesium glycinate before bed.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature tosses and turns at night, dark circles appear, recovery stats penalized

interactions.concern: Food intake, especially carbohydrates, blunts GH release. CJC-1295 efficacy significantly reduced if taken with or shortly after meals.
interactions.recommendation: Always dose CJC-1295 in a fasted state. Wait at least 2 hours after last meal. Morning fasted or bedtime dosing works best.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature GH boost animation only triggers when dosed fasted, no effect shown if fed

interactions.concern: Ipamorelin GH release is blunted by elevated blood sugar and insulin. Eating before dosing diminishes the GH pulse.
interactions.recommendation: Dose on empty stomach, at least 90 minutes after eating. Fasting windows naturally create ideal dosing opportunities.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature shows amplified GH pulse when dosed during fasting window

interactions.concern: Sauna sessions independently increase endogenous GH by 200-300%. Combined with CJC-1295, total GH elevation may become excessive, risking joint pain, water retention, and insulin resistance.
interactions.recommendation: Separate sauna sessions from CJC-1295 dosing by at least 4 hours. Monitor for signs of GH excess: joint aches, carpal tunnel, edema.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature overheats if sauna and peptide overlap, water retention visible as puffiness

interactions.concern: Sauna-induced GH release stacks with ipamorelin-stimulated pulses, potentially causing supraphysiological GH levels
interactions.recommendation: Use sauna on non-dosing days or separate by several hours. Cold plunge is generally safe and may enhance recovery synergistically.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature shows positive response to cold exposure, overheating warning with same-day sauna

interactions.concern: BPC-157 promotes tendon and tissue healing. Training the injured area post-workout may enhance local blood flow and peptide delivery to injury site.
interactions.recommendation: Time BPC-157 injection near injury site shortly after training the affected area. Light blood flow work preferred over heavy loading of injured tissue.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature healing animation accelerates when light training follows injection near injury

interactions.concern: TB-500 promotes systemic tissue repair and reduces inflammation. Post-exercise inflammation is a normal healing signal that TB-500 may modulate.
interactions.recommendation: Dose TB-500 after training sessions for best synergy with natural repair processes. Moderate training volume during active healing protocols.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature recovery bar fills faster when training and TB-500 are well-timed

interactions.concern: BPC-157 can modulate dopamine and serotonin systems. Some users report anxiety, which is amplified in individuals with existing high stress or cortisol levels.
interactions.recommendation: Start with lower doses if under significant stress. Monitor mood changes closely. Consider pausing during acute life stressors.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature becomes anxious and jittery when stress and BPC-157 overlap, mood instability

interactions.concern: BPC-157 is used for gut healing and gastroprotection. Alcohol directly damages gastric mucosa, counteracting BPC-157's protective and healing effects.
interactions.recommendation: Eliminate or drastically reduce alcohol during BPC-157 gut healing protocols. Even moderate drinking undermines the repair process.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature gut health bar progress resets when alcohol is consumed, healing animation stops

interactions.concern: Semaglutide pens require refrigeration before first use. Timezone changes shift weekly injection schedules. Airport security may question injectable medications.
interactions.recommendation: Carry medications in insulated travel pouch with ice packs. Bring prescription documentation. Adjust injection day if crossing many timezones rather than shifting hours.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature shows travel stress, medication efficacy indicator dims if cold chain broken

interactions.concern: Similar cold chain requirements to semaglutide. Multi-dose pens are temperature-sensitive. Meal timing disruption during travel compounds GI side effects.
interactions.recommendation: Pack in insulated case. Keep prescription label on medication. Plan meals around timezone to minimize nausea. Carry anti-nausea medication.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature gets nauseous during travel, stability decreases with disrupted routine

interactions.concern: Reconstituted BPC-157 requires refrigeration. Syringes and vials may trigger security scrutiny. Dosing schedule disrupted by timezone changes.
interactions.recommendation: Carry bacteriostatic water and lyophilized peptide separately if possible. Pack prescription or purchase documentation. Use insulated travel case.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature healing protocol interrupted, progress bar pauses during travel

interactions.concern: Reconstituted TB-500 is temperature-sensitive. Loading phase protocols requiring frequent dosing are difficult to maintain while traveling.
interactions.recommendation: Consider timing travel between loading and maintenance phases. Carry in insulated pouch. Pre-load syringes only if traveling short duration.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature repair progress slows during travel, maintenance mode activated

interactions.concern: Daily dosing schedule disrupted by timezone shifts. Reconstituted peptide requires cold storage. Evening dosing timing affected by jet lag.
interactions.recommendation: Gradually shift dosing time to destination timezone over 2-3 days. Keep cold chain intact. Pack backup supplies.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature GH rhythm disrupted, sleep cycle indicator desynchronizes

interactions.concern: Bedtime dosing protocol disrupted by timezone changes and jet lag. GH pulse timing becomes suboptimal.
interactions.recommendation: Dose at local bedtime in destination timezone. Prioritize sleep normalization. Cold chain maintenance essential.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature sleep-GH sync breaks during travel, gradually re-syncs after arrival

interactions.concern: GLP-1 efficacy may vary across menstrual cycle phases. Delayed gastric emptying can affect oral contraceptive absorption timing and reliability.
interactions.recommendation: Track symptoms across cycle phases. Use backup contraception if on oral birth control. Report cycle irregularities to prescriber.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature effectiveness fluctuates with cycle phase, contraceptive warning icon appears

interactions.concern: Rapid weight loss can disrupt menstrual regularity. Dual agonist gastroparesis may further affect oral contraceptive absorption.
interactions.recommendation: Monitor cycle regularity closely. Consider non-oral contraception methods. Report any cycle changes to prescriber immediately.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature hormonal balance indicator fluctuates, cycle regularity stat affected

interactions.concern: Most aggressive weight loss of GLP-1s creates highest risk of menstrual disruption. Hormonal fluctuations may affect tolerability.
interactions.recommendation: Expect potential cycle disruption during rapid weight loss phase. Use non-oral contraception. Track symptoms by cycle phase for dose adjustment discussions.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature shows hormonal instability markers, cycle tracking becomes important game mechanic

interactions.concern: Semax is a nootropic that modulates BDNF and can have stimulatory effects. High baseline stress/cortisol may amplify overstimulation or anxiety in sensitive individuals.
interactions.recommendation: Start with lower doses during high-stress periods. Morning dosing preferred to avoid sleep disruption. Pair with stress management practices.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature becomes overstimulated and wired when stress is high, focus stat fluctuates

interactions.concern: Selank has anxiolytic properties and modulates GABA. Context of existing stress levels affects optimal dosing. May cause excess sedation in some.
interactions.recommendation: Selank can be beneficial during stress but calibrate dose to stress level. Start low. May be more useful during acute stress than chronic.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature calms visibly with selank during stress, but may become too relaxed if over-dosed

interactions.concern: GHK-Cu promotes collagen synthesis and skin repair. UV radiation causes direct DNA damage and collagen breakdown, directly counteracting GHK-Cu's benefits.
interactions.recommendation: Use broad-spectrum SPF 30+ daily while on GHK-Cu protocols. Avoid peak sun hours. Topical GHK-Cu should be applied after sun exposure, not before.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature skin repair progress reversed by sun damage, sunburn animation overrides healing

interactions.concern: Tesamorelin is a GHRH analog that stimulates GH release. Like other GH peptides, sleep quality directly impacts the efficacy of GH protocols.
interactions.recommendation: Dose before bed on empty stomach. Maintain consistent sleep schedule. Sleep deprivation significantly reduces tesamorelin effectiveness.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature fat reduction and body composition improvements tied to sleep quality score

interactions.concern: Food intake blunts GH release stimulated by tesamorelin. Insulin elevation from meals directly suppresses GH secretion.
interactions.recommendation: Always dose in fasted state. Minimum 2 hours after last meal. Morning fasted or bedtime dosing optimal.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature GH response only activates when fasting state confirmed

interactions.concern: Tesamorelin reduces visceral adipose tissue. Resistance training enhances body recomposition effects synergistically.
interactions.recommendation: Combine with regular resistance training for optimal body composition changes. Training amplifies the visceral fat reduction effects.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature body composition visibly improves when training and tesamorelin are combined

interactions.concern: Sauna-induced GH release may stack with tesamorelin GHRH stimulation, risking excessive GH levels
interactions.recommendation: Separate sauna from tesamorelin dosing by 4+ hours. Monitor for water retention and joint pain as signs of GH excess.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature shows swelling indicator if sauna and dosing overlap too closely

interactions.concern: Chronic stress suppresses immune function via cortisol. Thymosin alpha-1 modulates immune response but may be less effective when cortisol is chronically elevated.
interactions.recommendation: Address chronic stress alongside thymosin alpha-1 protocols. Stress management enhances immune modulation effects. Consider adaptogenic support.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature immune shield weakened when stress bar is high, thymosin boost partially blocked

interactions.concern: Immune restoration and T-cell maturation occur primarily during deep sleep. Poor sleep undermines thymosin alpha-1's immunomodulatory effects.
interactions.recommendation: Prioritize consistent 7-9 hours sleep. Immune peptide protocols are significantly more effective with good sleep hygiene.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature immune stat rebuilds during sleep, stagnates with poor sleep quality

interactions.concern: Travel exposes immune system to novel pathogens while disrupting sleep and increasing stress, all of which affect thymosin alpha-1 protocols.
interactions.recommendation: Consider increasing thymosin alpha-1 frequency before and during travel. Maintain cold chain. Prioritize sleep at destination.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature immune shield activates protectively during travel, pathogen exposure indicators appear

interactions.concern: Semax's stimulatory and BDNF-enhancing effects can disrupt sleep if dosed too late in the day
interactions.recommendation: Dose semax in the morning only. Avoid afternoon or evening administration. If sleep disruption occurs, reduce dose.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature becomes wired and unable to sleep if semax dosed late, focus trades off with rest

interactions.concern: Selank's GABAergic anxiolytic effects can promote sleep when dosed in the evening, but may cause daytime drowsiness if timing is wrong
interactions.recommendation: Evening dosing can aid sleep quality. Avoid high doses before activities requiring alertness. Adjust timing based on response.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature sleeps peacefully with evening selank, but may be drowsy if dosed at wrong time

interactions.concern: BPC-157 promotes angiogenesis and tissue repair. Theoretical concern that enhanced angiogenesis near sun-damaged skin could promote abnormal cell growth.
interactions.recommendation: Use sun protection during BPC-157 protocols. Avoid injecting near sun-damaged or suspicious skin lesions. Discuss with dermatologist if concerned.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature skin area shows caution marker near sun-exposed injection sites

interactions.concern: GHK-Cu supports connective tissue repair and collagen synthesis. Resistance training creates micro-damage that GHK-Cu may help repair faster.
interactions.recommendation: Apply topical GHK-Cu to areas worked during training. Systemic GHK-Cu may support joint and tendon health in active lifters.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature joint health and skin elasticity improve when training and GHK-Cu aligned

interactions.concern: Chronic cortisol elevation accelerates collagen breakdown and skin aging, counteracting GHK-Cu's regenerative effects
interactions.recommendation: Address stress management alongside GHK-Cu skin protocols. Cortisol reduction amplifies GHK-Cu benefits for skin and tissue quality.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature skin repair slowed when stress is elevated, aging indicators appear

interactions.concern: GLP-1 induced nausea and GI discomfort can disrupt sleep, especially during dose titration. Some report vivid dreams.
interactions.recommendation: Take injection earlier in the day if nighttime nausea occurs. Elevate head of bed if reflux is an issue. Report persistent insomnia to prescriber.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature tosses restlessly on dose-up weeks, settles once adjusted

interactions.concern: Stress eating is suppressed by GLP-1s, removing a coping mechanism. Cortisol elevation may also slow weight loss progress.
interactions.recommendation: Develop alternative stress coping strategies before starting. Recognize that plateau periods may correlate with high-stress phases. Consider therapy support.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature mood drops when stress coping mechanisms are blocked, needs alternative comfort sources

interactions.concern: Heat increases blood flow and may enhance BPC-157 distribution. Cold reduces inflammation which may synergize with or partially overlap BPC-157's anti-inflammatory effects.
interactions.recommendation: Mild heat exposure after injection may enhance local delivery. Cold exposure post-training can complement healing. Avoid extreme temperature at injection site.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature healing boosted by moderate heat, cold provides complementary recovery

interactions.concern: TB-500 reduces inflammation and promotes vascular repair. Endurance training creates cardiovascular adaptations that may synergize with TB-500's vascular effects.
interactions.recommendation: TB-500 can support endurance athletes recovering from overtraining. Moderate training volume during active loading phase.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature cardiovascular health indicator improves with combined cardio and TB-500

interactions.concern: CJC-1295 elevates GH which supports muscle protein synthesis and recovery. Resistance training provides the stimulus that GH amplifies.
interactions.recommendation: Train consistently while on CJC-1295 to maximize body composition benefits. Post-workout dosing on training days can enhance recovery.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature muscle growth and recovery amplified when training and GH peptides are synced

interactions.concern: Ipamorelin-stimulated GH pulses support muscle recovery and growth. Without training stimulus, GH elevation provides minimal anabolic benefit.
interactions.recommendation: Pair ipamorelin with structured resistance training program for meaningful body composition improvements.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature muscle stats only improve when both ipamorelin and training are active

interactions.concern: Chronic cortisol elevation antagonizes GH effects on body composition. Stress undermines the anabolic benefits of GH peptide protocols.
interactions.recommendation: Manage stress actively during GH peptide protocols. Consider meditation, therapy, or adaptogens. Cortisol control amplifies GH benefits.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature GH benefits muted when stress bar is high, cortisol cloud blocks growth animation

interactions.concern: Rapid weight loss can leave skin less resilient. Sun damage compounds reduced skin elasticity from fat loss.
interactions.recommendation: Use sun protection during weight loss phases. Consider collagen supplementation. Gradual weight loss preserves skin quality better.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature skin quality indicator drops when rapid weight loss and sun exposure combine

interactions.concern: Semax enhances BDNF which supports neuroplasticity and may improve mind-body coordination. Cardiovascular exercise also raises BDNF independently.
interactions.recommendation: Morning semax followed by cardio may create synergistic BDNF elevation. Excellent combination for cognitive performance.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature brain and body stats both boosted when semax and cardio combine, synergy bonus

interactions.concern: Selank's anxiolytic effects may reduce exercise-induced anxiety and improve performance in those who experience exercise anxiety
interactions.recommendation: Pre-workout selank may help anxious exercisers. Monitor for drowsiness affecting workout quality. Adjust dose to find performance sweet spot.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature exercises with less anxiety, smoother cardio sessions, calmer heart rate display

interactions.concern: Heat stress from sauna can damage skin collagen. Cold exposure constricts blood vessels, potentially reducing topical GHK-Cu absorption.
interactions.recommendation: Apply topical GHK-Cu after temperature exposure sessions, not before. Sauna heat without skin protection counteracts collagen benefits.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature skin repair most effective when GHK-Cu applied post-temperature session

interactions.concern: Triple agonist has glucagon receptor activity affecting liver metabolism. Alcohol adds hepatic burden on top of strongest gastroparesis effect.
interactions.recommendation: Eliminate alcohol. Liver function monitoring recommended. The combination carries highest hepatic risk of any GLP-1 + alcohol pairing.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature liver health indicator flashes red, severe nausea and health penalty

interactions.concern: Newer compound with less established protocols for travel. Cold chain critical. Weekly injection timing disrupted by timezone shifts.
interactions.recommendation: Plan injection day around travel schedule. Carry medication with temperature monitoring. Keep prescriber contact information accessible.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature routine disruption amplified due to newer protocol, stability decreases more than other GLP-1s

interactions.concern: Daily injection schedule makes travel particularly challenging. Reconstituted tesamorelin requires refrigeration.
interactions.recommendation: Pack enough reconstituted medication plus backup lyophilized vials. Insulated travel case essential. Plan for daily dosing across timezones.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature fat loss progress pauses during travel if dosing schedule disrupted

interactions.concern: Chronic stress impairs wound healing and tissue repair through cortisol-mediated mechanisms, reducing TB-500's regenerative benefits.
interactions.recommendation: Address stress during healing protocols. TB-500 works best in a recovery-supportive environment with managed cortisol levels.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature healing rate slowed by stress cloud, repair animations dimmed

interactions.concern: Alcohol suppresses GH release and disrupts sleep quality. Both effects directly undermine ipamorelin's mechanism of action.
interactions.recommendation: Avoid alcohol on dosing days, especially evening doses. Even moderate drinking significantly reduces the GH pulse response.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature GH pulse blocked on nights with alcohol, sleep quality and growth stats drop

interactions.concern: Alcohol suppresses GH secretion and impairs sleep architecture, eliminating the deep sleep phases where CJC-1295 amplifies GH pulses.
interactions.recommendation: Minimize alcohol, especially on dosing days. Alcohol before bed negates the entire purpose of bedtime GH peptide dosing.
interactions.creature_effect: Creature nighttime GH pulse animation absent after alcohol consumption
